description_long: This is a modern two-story house situated on a grassy plot with a paved driveway and walkway leading to the main entrance. The house features a flat, dark-colored roof and a combination of light and dark exterior wall finishes, likely using concrete or stucco with accent panels. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light. The front entryway is defined by a small covered porch with supporting columns and a direct path from the street. The property includes a driveway that leads to a garage integrated into the house structure. The overall design is clean and geometric, emphasizing functionality and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a covered front porch, set on a grassy lot with a paved driveway and integrated garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, and garage access.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and the continuation of the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back porch area and rear windows, with less architectural detail than the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows and the side yard, with the driveway visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with supporting columns, direct walkway, and a modern single-door entry
